phases.name: Database Migration to Local MySQL
phases.description: Transitioned application profiles and configuration defaults from cloud Aiven DB to local standalone MySQL environments.
achievements: Updated .env variables to target local host connections (port 3306, user root, pass 0721)
Modified application.yml defaults for all 9 database-backed microservices
Updated setup instructions in HOW_TO_START.txt with schema SQL scripts
Verified all services clean compilation using build_all.bat

phases.name: Monolith Feature Extraction & Services Integration
phases.description: Added new monolith features directly into microservice-based APIs and synchronized frontend controllers.
achievements: Implemented secure Forget Password and Reset Password flows with UUID tokens and expiration timers
Integrated Welcome Email Kafka event listener triggers on user registration
Exposed reviews statistics endpoints (/stats, /distribution) in review-service
Created consolidated multi-service admin exporters in notification-service generating Excel (.xlsx) and Word (.doc) using Apache POI library
Added AngularJS front-end routes, views, controllers and forms for forget-password, reset-password, and admin reports operations

phases.name: Dev Dashboard & History Integration
phases.description: Creating an admin dashboard viewer that allows team developers to trace project migration milestones and see active plans/tasks.
achievements: Defined a structured dev-history.json static database store
Created an interactive timeline display inside the Admin dashboard views
Added real-time progress tracing and design document shortcut downloads

upcomingPlans.task: Perform end-to-end load testing on the consolidated gateway API
Migrate notification templates to Thymeleaf templates rather than hardcoded HTML strings
Sync latest compiled APK assets with updated AngularJS code
